facebook.caption:
POV: you ducked into Hẻm 111 and found Đảo Hải Sản.

4.7 stars. 1,379 reviews. $15-30 a person for fresh seafood in Phu Quoc. Do the math.

This place is tucked into a side street off Đ. Trần Phú. Easy to walk past. Don't.

Order big. The bill still won't hurt.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the tank-to-table process at Đảo Hải Sản. Pick your seafood live, watch it land on your plate minutes later. $15-30 a head. 4.7 stars from 1,379 people. Hẻm 111 Đ. Trần Phú, Phu Quoc.
